tasks.description: Fix DialogTitle a11y warning, show starters on DB error, add aria-labels to icon buttons
acceptance_criteria: BUG-023: Audit every DialogContent in canvas-view.tsx render tree — ensure each has a DialogTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper). Zero DialogTitle console.error warnings.

BUG-023: If investigation reveals both dialogs (canvas-view.tsx Templates dialog and section-detail-panel.tsx Save as Template dialog) already have DialogTitle — check whether the issue is in Radix Dialog itself, a conditional render that unmounts DialogTitle, or a duplicated Dialog wrapper. If unfixable, add a comment documenting findings.

IMP-036: Template browser dialog shows STARTER_TEMPLATES cards unconditionally — even when templateError is set. When DB error occurs, render error message at top + starters below. Only hide DB template cards when error. Specifically: restructure the ternary at canvas-view.tsx line 372 so starters are outside the error branch.

IMP-030: All icon-only buttons on canvas toolbar and tab-bar have aria-label attributes. Audit existing buttons — Templates button (line 330) and Coloring button (line 344) already have aria-label. Find any remaining icon-only buttons that lack it.

patterns_to_follow: Radix Dialog pattern: every <DialogContent> must have a <DialogTitle> child (or VisuallyHidden DialogTitle)
aria-label pattern for icon buttons: aria-label='Action description' on <button> or <Button>

tasks.special_instructions: BUG-023 RESEARCH CONTEXT: Planner found that canvas-view.tsx line 361-363 (Templates dialog) and section-detail-panel.tsx line 388-390 (Save as Template dialog) both have DialogTitle. workspace-summary-panel.tsx and coloring-panel.tsx do NOT use DialogContent. The two errors may come from: (1) a Dialog open/close race condition, (2) Radix DialogContent portaling before DialogTitle mounts, or (3) a DialogContent elsewhere in layout-client.tsx or workspace-shell.tsx. Check if VisuallyHidden is needed for any dialogs that intentionally hide their title. IMP-036: The fix is in the ternary at line 372 — templateError branch hides starters. Restructure to: show error message at top, then ALWAYS show starters section below.

tasks.description: Add skeleton placeholders when Load More fetches in activity view
acceptance_criteria: When Load More button is clicked in activity view, 2-3 skeleton row placeholders appear below existing entries while loading
Skeleton rows match the layout of real activity entries (icon placeholder + 2 text lines + timestamp) using animate-pulse pattern
Skeleton rows disappear when new data arrives and real entries replace them
Follow existing Skeleton component usage from ui/skeleton.tsx if available, or use div + animate-pulse + bg-[var(--bg-surface-secondary)] matching existing skeleton patterns in the codebase
No layout shift when skeletons are replaced by real content

patterns_to_follow: Skeleton: div with bg-[var(--bg-surface-secondary)] rounded-[var(--radius-md)] animate-pulse
Activity entry layout: flex row with icon, text block (action + entity), and timestamp

warnings_added: IMP-035 appears already resolved — sidebar.tsx has 12 nav items including Runbooks, Activity, Gap Analysis, Compare, Dashboard. Reviewer should verify and mark resolved.
BUG-022 (migration 020 not pushed) requires human action: `npx supabase db push`. Builders cannot/should not push migrations to production DB autonomously.
BUG-021 confirmed already fixed in codebase (workspace-shell.tsx exclusion list includes runbooks, activity, gap-analysis). Only affects production (20+ commits behind).
FEAT-053 (Phase 4 testing gate) should be the NEXT iteration (103) — this cleanup iteration ensures a cleaner codebase for the gate.
